description: Leading peer learning initiatives for 100+ students in the Baraka Cohort. Organizing technical workshops and fostering a collaborative engineering culture. Advocating for curriculum improvements through student feedback.

Selected as Finalist among 12,362 participants (top 450). Mastered TypeScript, NestJS, and TypeORM in high-pressure sprint cycles. Collaborated with cross-functional sub-teams on real-world production projects under tight deadlines.
